description: Transit travel-time matrices (minutes) between walk routes, with time-of-day variants (AM/MD/PM) and collector home → route times. route_to_route_minutes = all-day baseline. tod_route_to_route_minutes.{AM,MD,PM} = per-TOD matrices. collector_to_route_minutes = all-day collector→route. tod_collector_to_route_minutes.{AM,MD,PM} = per-TOD collector→route.
